DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-20-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No Apperancesby either party.

Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows: CROSS DEFENDANT D ANDRE WHITE's DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend to allege facts (not conclusions) in support of each element of the elder abuse cause of action. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. Carl Harris has standing. In re Estate of Lowrie (2004) 118 Cal.App.4th 220. Moving party prepare order.

Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: N.Wong, Not Reported. (D501)
